title: haplophyllum megalanthum
intro: Haplophyllum megalanthum, also known as the giant orris, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, and treating skin conditions like eczema and dermatitis. Haplophyllum megalanthum can be prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
